schrodinger_free_particle.notes: Free-particle Schrödinger solution exp(ikx) is exactly 1 complex EML node. Extracting Re/Im gives cos(kx) and sin(kx) respectively.

kdv_soliton.notes: KdV 1-soliton. BEST construction via sech²(x) = recip(cosh(x))² uses ~18 real BEST nodes. No known shorter CBEST form.
kdv_soliton.verification: Satisfies u_x - 6u·u_x - u_xxx = 0 to machine precision

nls_bright_soliton.notes: Amplitude sech(x) = 2/(exp(x)+exp(-x)) ~ 2 BEST nodes for reciprocal cosh. Phase factor exp(it/2) adds 1 complex EML node.

schrodinger_potential_well.notes: nth eigenfunction sin(n·pi·x/L) is exactly 1 CBEST node via Euler path. Eigenvalue E_n = (n·pi/L)².
schrodinger_potential_well.verification: Exact via Euler path identity Im(exp(ix)) = sin(x)
